stages.exit_gate: Affected TaskSpec, MorphologySpec, SimSpec, PolicyArtifact, EvalResult, fixtures, seeds, and acceptance commands are explicit.
Each slice returns a contract-valid handoff and its focused checks pass.
One deterministic task-intake to morphology to sim rollout completes without private schemas.
PolicyArtifact and ranked rollouts include rewards, seed/config, and stopping reason.
Viewer/API can load the result, metrics are recorded, and replay/video evidence is linked.
Applicable repository gates pass and skipped gates are explained.

shared_path_policy.rule: A task must explicitly delegate a shared path before another role writes it.
